description_long: This is a modern bullpup-style shotgun with a tan and black color scheme, featuring a compact and tactical design. The receiver and stock are integrated, with the magazine located behind the pistol grip, characteristic of bullpup firearms. It has a full-length Picatinny rail on top for mounting optics or accessories, and a vertical foregrip attached to a short rail under the barrel for improved handling. The barrel is relatively short and ends with a muzzle brake or flash suppressor. The stock is solid and padded, and the magazine is detachable and box-shaped, suggesting a high-capacity design suitable for urban tactical use.
description: A compact, tan and black bullpup shotgun with a full-length top rail, vertical foregrip, and detachable box magazine. Its tactical design is suited for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, vertical foregrip, and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, the Picatinny rail, pistol grip, magazine, and stock details.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the Picatinny rail, barrel alignment, and overall slim profile.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine, and ergonomic stock design.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a short, vented barrel and muzzle brake
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a reinforced lower edge and integrated finger groove
